title: the Shadow Tapes
description: This project adds scary creature which will Stalks you all the time.
body:
The Shadow Tapes is a psychological horror mod that transforms Minecraft into a place of dread, silence, and unseen watchers. Strange entities lurk deep underground, stalking players from the shadows. They do not attack immediately — they observe. You may never see them, but you’ll feel them. The deeper you go, the stronger the presence becomes.

This mod introduces a growing sense of paranoia through ambient effects, eerie sounds, and subtle environmental changes. Creatures are designed not just to hunt, but to haunt — following players silently, appearing briefly in the distance, and vanishing before they can be confronted. Their behavior is unpredictable, their motives unknown.

You are not alone. You were never alone.
